playgrounds.title: Depth-First Traversal
playgrounds.blurb: Recursive DFS over an adjacency list — watch the call stack grow and unwind as nodes are visited.

playgrounds.title: Breadth-First Traversal
playgrounds.blurb: Iterative BFS over an adjacency list — watch the queue fill front-to-back and nodes get visited level by level.

playgrounds.title: BFS on a Grid
playgrounds.blurb: Iterative BFS over a 2D grid — watch the queue hold (row, col) coordinates and the frontier expand outward, one ring at a time.
